content:
Autumn Run

- Departed 05:30, cod north of the fjord.
- Held east of the ice per [[Weather/Notes]].
- ~18t cod, 6t haddock. Landed Friday at Vestfirsk Fiskur.

Build Log - 1:20 grandfather's trawler

- Keel and frames done.
- Hull planked, wheelhouse built.
- Next: rigging in linen over the winter [[Maintenance/Engine Refit]] window.

Reading

- Re-read Brooklyn (Toibin).
- The North Water (O'Brian) - on order.
- Dubliners (Joyce).

Engine Refit

- Haulout Dec 7, Nordurverksmidja.
- 4,500,000 ISK from the reserve, no borrowing.
- Injector set ordered.

Weather

- Band of ice north of the fjord - keep east.
- NW 18-24kt easing Thursday per Sean.

Christmas Eve

- Bridget, Declan, Liam and Erin.
- Lamb and colcannon. Jameson.

Workshop

- Tool storage upgrade.
- Root cellar restoration.
- Kitchen window replacement.

2026-10-03

- Coffee with Sean at the hut.
- Checked on Bridget.
- Provisions for the run.
